pageTitle.value: CERN & Society Foundation - Perpetual Planet - Video

WaPageTitle.value: CERN & Society Foundation - Perpetual Planet - Video

metadescription.value: The CERN & Society Foundation inspires future scientists through the Science Gateway and Beamline for Schools competition. Watch the video on rolex.org.

text.value: Exploration, innovation and precision engineering are at the heart of the long-standing relationship between Rolex and CERN. Initially brought together almost 70 years ago by a shared interest in innovation and technology development, today we support the CERN & Society Foundation in its mission to share the renowned laboratory’s boundary-defying science and inspire a new generation of scientific explorers. CERN’s exploration of the fundamental mysteries of the universe – from where it came from to what it is made of – has led to the birth of the World Wide Web, the development of touchscreens, and new medical technologies.

pageCaption.value: Neuroscientist Grégoire Courtine's revolutionary "digital bridge" technology could change the lives of those with spinal cord injuries. Learn more on rolex.org.

pageCaption.value: Piyush Tewari is determined to save thousands of lives by ensuring that most accident victims in Delhi receive rapid medical care. His foundation, in partnership with hospitals and a medical science institute, has already provided training sessions in basic life support to over 2,000 police officers, as well as 500 ordinary citizens.

pageCaption.value: Billy Lee Lasley’s invention of a non-invasive method for determining the sex of birds — designed to help protect endangered species such as eagles — has slowly been adopted by researchers around the world. Perhaps more importantly, his work has proved to have other uses, including monitoring the reproductive health of women exposed to chemicals in the environment.

pageCaption.value: Around 20 million people worldwide have a spinal cord injury, which has a major impact on their quality of life.

pageTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate - Beth Koigi - Episode 1

pageCaption.value: Growing up in Limuru, Kenya, entrepreneur Beth Koigi was surrounded by the lush greenery of wetland swamps and rain-blessed hills.

WaPageTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate - Beth Koigi - Episode 1

metadescription.value: Entrepreneur Beth Koigi is combating water scarcity in Kenya’s most arid regions with her social enterprise Majik Water. Watch the video on rolex.org.

previewTitle.value: 2023 Rolex Awards Laureate: Beth Koigi - Episode 1

pageTitle.value: Rolex Awards - Preventing car accidents in India - Video

pageCaption.value: Motivated by the unnecessary death of his cousin in a road accident where bystanders typically ignored the victim’s plight, successful Indian businessman and 2010 Rolex Awards for Enterprise Laureate Piyush Tewari gave up his career to concentrate on helping to save the lives of his compatriots on the country’s chaotic roads.

WaPageTitle.value: Saving lives on India’s roads - Video

metadescription.value: Since winning a Rolex Award, Piyush Tewari has expanded solutions for fatality-free roadways to 15 states across India. Watch the video on rolex.org.
